name: anythingmcp
desc: Self-hosted, open-source MCP gateway: turn any API, database or MCP server into custom connectors for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot & Cursor — no code. Conv…
descFull: Self-hosted, open-source MCP gateway: turn any API, database or MCP server into custom connectors for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot & Cursor — no code. Convert REST, SOAP, WSDL, GraphQL & SQL to MCP, with OAuth2, RBAC & audit log. 175+ pre-built adapters (Deutsche Bahn, weclapp, Etsy, DHL, Shopware…)
